mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TRADES WHERE CLIENTID = #{clientId} AND TIMESTAMP > #{timestamp}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRADES (TRADEID, CLIENTID, INSTRUMENTID, QUANTITY, EXECUTIONPRICE, DIRECTION, ORDERID, CASHVALUE, TIMESTAMP) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{clientId}, #{instrumentId}, #{quantity}, #{executionPrice}, #{direction}, #{orderId}, #{cashValue}, #{timestamp})
